programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 824
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass' Dave England shows Rob, Chanel, and Sterling what it takes to inspire a generation of "Poo Pros," gets careless with some "Bad Daddies" and the agony of getting "Butt Hurt."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo enter the SNACK ZONE, learn the dangers of hiring BUDGET BABYSITTERS and root on reckless golf cart drivers in COUNTRY CLUB DRIFT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 718
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, motocross champion Ryan Villopoto joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to learn when it's "Time To Retire," start some "Workplace Throwdowns"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 26
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness the 80's are back with Rockdiculousness! Steel Panther joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to fire up the FLAME FUEL, grab some COMMUNITY PROPERTY and tempt death with LIVIN' ON A PRAYER.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 817
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling are joined by the coolest granny in the game, Baddie Winkle, who teaches us how to stay young in "Fountain of Baddie,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo witness WORLD WAR BEE, diagnose a medical condition known as BACKFLIP BLOCK, and avoid stray tires in THE WHEEL WORLD.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, NASCAR's Bubba Wallace sits with Rob, Stee-lo and Chanel to drive fast and hard in "Trading Paint," play some "Next Level Games" and get into some road rage throwdowns in "Street Heat."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 827
programme.desc: Tonight on an all-new Ridiculousness, the legendary television host Jerry Springer joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to chant "Jerry! Jerry! Jerry!", watch some "Beastdowns" and post some photos on "Injurgram."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 701
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, 50 Cent joins Rob, Stee-Lo, and Chanel to discuss his "Crappy Birthday," people who are "Built Like 50," and others who, like 50, are real "Show Stealers."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 708
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to tell some "Dirty Secrets", taste some "All Natural Beef" and clench for the category "Spike My Butt"."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: Tonight on an all new Ridiculousness, the crew is joined by multi-platinum singer/songwriter Leona Lewis to watch some of her fellow "Aisle Trolls", be misunderstood while "Speaking Leonese"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 7
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, it's all about the kids! Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the next generation by drinking some GO GO JUICE, getting caught up in TINY TORNADOS, and joining TYKE CLUB.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 23
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, reality star Tami Roman joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to talk about her extreme case of RATNAPHOBIA, what it means to be STREET DUMB, and about living with BUTT REGRET.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo check out the fierce LAWN WARRIORS, learn some wisdom in SPEAK YOUR MIND and witness some FURRY FURY.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 12
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the greatest form of precipitation, Rob, Steelo and Chanel pay a visit to the CUL-DE-SLOPES, watch some ICE CARPADES, and find evidence of the elusive SNOW SCORPIONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling dodge some "No Look Slaps," hit the "Sensi-Button," and experience the drama of "The Circle Of Life."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 822
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel pay homage to some "Legendary Assists," bust up some public makeouts with "PDA Police," and find out why babies are nothing more than "Tiny People, Tiny Brains."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 715
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, American Idol Winner, Jordin Sparks, joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to get "Wet And Afraid," watch some dogs go "Nuts About Balls" and learn it's hard to breathe with "No Air."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling discuss a condition called "Temporary Fansanity", people who are "Quick To Cry" and our favorite summer sporting event, the "Bro Games".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 728
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling check out some hard-working monkeys in "Bananas Ain't Free," throw down in "Stripe Club" and dress up nice for some "Formal Slams."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 702
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Action Bronson joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to showcase his wrestling moves with "Bronsonmania," watch some "White People Dancing,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 723
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling keep their area free from "Space Invaders," nap hard after a "Slumber Punch," and see just how weird it gets when cats get their paws on "Too Much Nip."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, and with a whole new stage, Rob, Chanel, and Sterling "Do It For The Vine", bust out their 3D glasses for the category "3Diculousness" and watch some old folks slam in the "Grey Games".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, basketball great Metta World Peace joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to play "Metta Ball," having a job when you're "Here For The Discount,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, business guru Marcus Lemonis shows us his "Lemonis Face", teaches us the 3Ps of "People, Process, Pain" and finally discovers that "They Do Exist!".

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 708
programme.desc: South Park is Gay! The TV show Queer Eye For The Straight Guy is sweeping the nation and the men of South Park are embracing metrosexuality, but what evil plan are the hosts plotting? (S7, E08)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: Christian Hard Rock: The boys form a band called Moop, but disagree on what direction they should take. Cartman leaves the band and bets them he will have a platinum record first! (S7, E09)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: Casa Bonita: Cartman is overjoyed at going to a Mexican restaurant for Kyle's birthday but is crushed when he finds out Butters is invited instead. He'll have to make Butters "disappear". (S7, E11)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 712
programme.desc: All About The Mormons: A new family moves to South Park and their son Gary is an unusually perfect Mormon - this angers the boys no end! Will Stan beat him up or go for a family dinner?! (S7, E12)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: Butt Out: When the boys' smoking leads to a nasty incident, it's the cigarettes that are blamed rather than them. Cue the glutinous Rob Reiner to arrive in town with his anti-smoking lobby! (S7, E13)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: Raisins: When Wendy breaks up with Stan he takes it hard. The boys decide to take him to the restaurant Raisins, where all of the employees are preteen girls who enjoy wearing heavy make-up. (S7, E14)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The children of South Park are attracted to "Mr. Jefferson," the new neighbor in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get "Mr. Jefferson" to love him best.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall-Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: The Passion of the Jew: After seeing 'The Passion of the Christ' a zealous Cartman taunts Kyle. When Stan and Kenny see it, they hate it and harass a crazed Mel Gibson for their money back! (S8, E03)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: You Got F'd in the A: The boys get 'served' by some kids from the O.C. so now 'it's on!'. Stan puts together a dance troupe who must compete in the dance-off. Will Randy's moves save them? (S8, E04)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: Pre-School: The boys are pooping their pants after hearing that Trent, a notorious bully from their pre-school years, is being released from juvenile hall - guess who put him there? (S8, E10)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: Quest For Ratings: When the gang's school news programme trails far behind Craig's show, "Animals Close-Up With a Wide-Angle Lens", they pledge to boost their ratings - how far will they go? (S8, E11)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset: Paris Hilton opens a store in South Park, corrupting the town's girls in the process. It's up to Mr Slave to put things right - time for a "***** off!" (S8, E12)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The boys set up a talent agency and pool all their resources and impress their first client only to have another agency steal him away.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After the sudden on-set of the disease Gingervitis, Cartman rallies all other ginger kids to rise up and assume their role as the master race.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park, and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 510
programme.desc: Helen agrees to help her niece with her divorce, Jake leaves home to escape Helen and Aunt Rita's bickering, Daria avoids Tom, and Stacy and Tiffany face a fashion dilemma.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 509
programme.desc: Daria and Jane's friendship is tested when Jane dates an opinionated guy with a love for everything vintage, and Upchuck tries his hand at magic.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Stimpy's stupidity becomes too much for Ren and he leaves home to become a hermit. All alone, Ren begins to go crazy because he misses his true friend.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy find themselves in elf and gnome world where everyone happily works to graduate Pixie status. Stimpy loves his new work, but Ren thinks it's too hard and everyone is too happy.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Randall is infected by horrifying plants at sea when Twayne throws a cruise ship party.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The situation grows increasingly dire for everyone trapped in the van, and Foxxy is taken captive.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Becoming a breakfast cereal mascot leads Wooldoor to fame and Crunch Berries addiction.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: When Daria volunteers at a retirement home, she discovers that her tone makes her as unpopular with the senior citizens as it does with her peers.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Jake gets Daria a job after she reveals the result of her career aptitude test, Trent and Jesse attempt to write a new song, and Jane tries to save Daria from humiliation.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mark cares for an undocumented werewolf, and Leonard envies his famous magician brother, Christ Angel.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: When the Morgendorffers move to Lawndale, bubbly younger daughter Quinn becomes instantly popular while her sarcastic sister Daria is told to work on her self-esteem.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Jane and Trent head to a Lane family reunion, and Helen decides to take the Morgendorffer's on a family camping trip for rest and relaxation.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The housemates rise up against the dreaded "Reality TV Twist."

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Daria struggles with Jane's unexpected desire to be on the school track team.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When ditzy cheerleader Brittany invites Daria to a party with the popular kids, Quinn reveals that she'll also be attending the party.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A New York Department of Integration social worker helps supernatural creatures adapt to city life.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The roommates gather for a very special clip show reunion sit-down with The Producer.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Quinn feels so pressured to get plastic surgery after another Fashion Club member gets a nose job that she pulls Daria out of class to go to a consultation with her.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy are preparing for Yaksmas, the wonderful holiday where Stinky Weezelteats and his sidekick Yak visit and leave great gifts, such as hot link sausages and pre-chewed gum.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Manbird season hits New York City, and Mark finds himself the guardian of a fledgling separated from its flock.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 3

programme.title: Confidence

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Zeta goes toe-to-toe with a powerful Sea Enchantress named Uzma. When Arabella flubs a wish grant, the girls must quickly fix her mistake or else the Dance of the Jellyfish will be ruined.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Leah and Zac are pumped for day of bowling! But Leah is having a tough time trying to knock down a single pin, so she calls on Shimmer and Shine to lend a little genie magic to improve her game.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Dora and Boots are getting ready for a big beach picnic with their friends, but when Benny gets stranded on Coconut Island, he'll need rescuing from Dora, Boots, and YOU!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 620
programme.desc: Swiper was packing all of his favorite things for a sleepover at his Grandma's House. But just as he was about to go, a big wind came in and blew everything away! Will Swiper find a way to use his new super-Swiper-spin today?!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Race Around Umi City: The fastest vehicles in town are competing for the ultimate prize - balloons! Everybody loves balloons. Team Umizoomi enter the race, hoping to win a balloon for their friend.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Zeta steals Shimmer, Shine, and Leah's wishing star, and they must get it back before Zeta makes a wish. Zac wishes up a cool new carpet. But when Zeta gets her hands on it, the kids must find a way to get it back.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Blaze and Stripes sail to Animal Island - an incredible place inhabited by monster truck animals!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Leah wins a genie bottle pendant at a carnival and is surprised to find that her prize comes with a bonus – genies Shimmer and Shine. Part 1.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 116
programme.desc: It's almost time for the show, but Sophia's butterfly costume isn't finished! Team Umizoomi must complete the costume and get it to Sophia before the curtain goes up!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 616
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and King Unicornio leave Enchanted Forest to join Diego in making the lost continent of Atlantis rise by ending an ancient feud between unicorns and dragons!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Zeg is out smashing things with Blaze and AJ when he finds a tiny dinosaur egg. Now the three friends must embark on an epic journey across a prehistoric landscape to return the egg to its Truckodactyl mother.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 6

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: It's time for Shimmer, Shine, and Leah to celebrate their Wishaversary! Shimmer and Shine made Leah the perfect gift: a bracelet with a magical touch. But Rocket gets a hold of Leah's bracelet and starts to float!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 997
programme.desc: Dora's Dance to the Rescue: Put on your dancing shoes, because Dora needs you to spin, shake wiggle, jump and clap with her as she tries to rescue Swiper the fox, who's been trapped inside a bottle by a mean dancing elf.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Dora's Great Roller Skate Adventure: Dora and Boots put on their roller skates and take off on a skating adventure to stand up to a bully named Big Wheeler and open Skate Park for everyone.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Dora's and Sparky's Riding Adventure!: After helping Sparky the horse feel better, Dora goes on one more ride with him before bringing him back to the barn.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Dora and Boots rush to take Dora's friend, Night Light, to the Library before it gets too dark for the little chickens' special story time.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 14

programme.desc: Today's Benny's Sing-Along Party where Dora and Benny are going to sing a very special song together! C'mon, let's all sing-along!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Gabby has the perfect tool to get Blaze ready to race: a special remote that can control any machine. But when Crusher takes her remote, he activates machines all over town to slow Blaze down.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The girls visit the Glitter Genie to learn glitter magic, but something is causing Shimmer to keep messing up. / The girls visit the Gem Princess, who takes them underwater to help gather crystals in the beautiful coral reef.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: When Leah accidentally lets a goat out of its pen at the petting zoo, she calls on Shimmer and Shine to help get him back. The girls and pets are led on a farmland adventure in pursuit of the escaped goat.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 100
programme.desc: SpongeBob's singing means no more Krabby Patties in 'Banned In Bikini Bottom'. Then in 'Stanley S. SquarePants', SpongeBob's cousin comes to visit, and quickly turns his life upside down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Squidward invites a TV show to visit his not exactly camera-ready home in 'House Fancy', then in 'Krabby Road', SpongeBob thinks that Plankton is trying to start a band. Which gives Plankton an idea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Mr Krabs can't believe that SpongeBob found a penny in 'Penny Foolish', and then in 'Nautical Novice', SpongeBob thinks of a new way to get his boating licence from Mrs. Puff.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 103
programme.desc: Plankton replaces the Chum Bucket with a Roman coliseum (and togas!) in 'Spongicus', and then in 'Suctioncup Symphony', Squidward is sure to win a music contest - if SpongeBob and Patrick stay quiet!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 104
programme.desc: When Squidward points out that SpongeBob is 'Not Normal', he resolves to change his ways. And then in 'Gone', SpongeBob wakes up to discover that everyone in Bikini Bottom is... gone!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 105
programme.desc: SpongeBob is injured at work in 'The Splinter', while in 'Slide Whistle Stooges', SpongeBob and Patrick are driving Squidward crazy with their new slide whistles.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 106
programme.desc: Patrick decides it's time to start living life like Larry the Lobster in 'A Life In A Day', and then in 'Sun Bleached', SpongeBob tries to get a tan, with disappointing results.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 107
programme.desc: Squidward becomes monstrously huge, which only pleases SpongeBob and Patrick, in 'Giant Squidward', and in 'No Nose Knows', Patrick notices that he has no nose. How does he smell? He doesn't. Yet!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 108
programme.desc: The Krabby Patty's secret ingredient is stolen and SpongeBob must find it in 'The Patty Caper', and then in 'Plankton's Regular', Plankton is surprised to have a regular customer who enjoys his food.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Squidward gets busted for speeding in his boat (which isn't a speedboat) and is sent back to boating school in 'Boating Buddies'. Then in 'The Krabby Kronicle', Mr Krabs sets up his own newspaper.

programme.desc: Mr Krabs must pretend to be a pirate for a visiting relative in 'Grandpappy The Pirate', and in 'Cephalopod Lodge', SpongeBob and Patrick accidentally get Squidward expelled from a secret society.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 116
programme.desc: In 'Squidward's Visit', SpongeBob is desperate to have Squidward visit him at home, but Squidward says no, and the store is all out of square pants in 'To Squarepants or Not To Squarepants',

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 117

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 119
